title: Goal Request
description: User-supplied goal request that starts a Goal-Driven Agent Workflow run.

goal.description: The user-visible outcome the workflow should achieve.

criteria.description: Observable success criteria used by the checker workflow.

context.description: Optional non-secret context the agents may use.

max_iterations.description: Maximum number of executor/checker loops before the workflow stops.

timeout_minutes.description: Maximum wall-clock runtime before the workflow stops.

require_human_approval.description: Whether the workflow should preserve a manual approval checkpoint.

risk_level.description: Initial risk classification for routing and approval decisions.

requester.description: Optional caller identity metadata without secrets.
